summary: Completed comprehensive testing of listings functionality. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend successfully loads data from MongoDB, and CSV import functionality is implemented. Fixed React component errors to enable proper UI rendering.

ui_bugs.issue: Admin button not clickable due to overlay interception

passed_tests: Error handling for non-existent listings (404 responses)
Frontend loads listings from backend API on startup
Frontend displays listings in grid layout
Frontend search functionality works with backend data
React component error fixes for missing properties
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Admin button clickability issue - button is being intercepted by hero overlay elements. Consider adjusting z-index or positioning of navigation elements.
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (16/16 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (all core functionality working, minor UI issue with admin access)
